executionHistory.summary: Created spec.md with 5 use cases, 10 business scenarios, 10 requirements (R-2501 to R-2510), 10 Gherkin scenarios, 26 acceptance criteria, competitive analysis, and 5 improvement proposals addressing all identified LLM Wiki pattern gaps

Added UI Wireframes and User Flows to spec.md: 12 screens (6 new web, 4 new Telegram, 2 modified), 4 user flow diagrams (web discovery, health monitoring, Telegram query, system pipeline). Covers both HTMX web surface and Telegram bot surface with full accessibility, responsive, and interaction specifications.

statusDiscipline.scopePickupRule: All dependsOn scopes must be Done. Pick the lowest-numbered eligible scope.
statusDiscipline.specDoneRequires: All scopes done. certification.completedScopes contains all scope IDs and bubbles.validate has certified promotion.

notes: Addresses 5 gaps identified from Karpathy LLM Wiki pattern analysis: pre-synthesis layer, prompt contract implementation, incremental knowledge building, lint/quality maintenance, cross-source synthesis at ingest time.
